description_long: This chair features a modern, angular design with a wide, deep seat and a slightly reclined backrest, both cushioned in a dark, muted fabric. The frame is constructed from sturdy black metal, with the sides and back formed by interwoven, ribbon-like slats that create a visually striking, semi-open pattern. The armrests are integrated into the frame, providing both support and a sense of enclosure. The seat and back cushions appear plush and comfortable, contrasting with the hard, sleek frame. The chair stands on four slender, tapered legs, giving it a stable yet lightweight appearance. Its contemporary style and durable materials make it suitable for both urban outdoor and indoor settings.
description: A modern chair with a black metal frame, interwoven slat sides, and plush dark cushions, designed for comfort and style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, plush cushions, and the open, woven pattern of the armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushion, and the angular armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the woven slat pattern across the back and the full width of the backrest cushion.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the side profile of the cushion and the armrest structure.
